title: PlausiDen — typed substrate for software that lasts
description: A typed-substrate platform for teams that want their tools to outlive their dependencies.

sections.title: A build platform that outlives its dependencies.
sections.lede: Typed contracts at every boundary. Merkle-chained audit reports on every commit. Engineered for the privacy-first internet.

items.hint: No string keys, no dynamic schemas, no escape hatches that decay.
Hermetic builds. Today. Next decade. Forever.

items.value: Pick the network. Or all six.
items.hint: Clearnet · Tor · I2P · IPFS · Gemini · Lokinet.
LFI evaluates. LLMs only generate candidates. Type-enforced.
No telemetry leaves the box. No CDN, no fonts, no fingerprints.

sections.body: We were tired of CMSes that rot. So we built the substrate the way compilers ship software — typed, audited, reproducible.

sections.text: What you write is what compiles.

Content lives in JSON files. The CMS schema is closed enums and deny_unknown_fields all the way down. Mistakes fail at parse time, not at publish time. Schema migrations are minutes — the types are the migration.

Themes are CSS variables exposed through typed Loom tokens. Switch palette by changing one attribute on <html>. Thirteen named themes ship today: light, dark, dark-AMOLED, hc-dark, hc-light, sepia, warm, ocean, forest, violet, rose, auto, and a per-tenant override slot.

sections.title: Your content is a typed value. Not a template string.
sections.lede: Closed-enum CmsSection variants. deny_unknown_fields on every struct. Validators that fire when the JSON parses, not when the page ships.

rows.label: Multi-network publish
values: Tor · I2P · IPFS · Gemini · Lokinet · clearnet

sections.caption: Audit chain output, last build — copy from /reports/latest.json on any deployment.
Substrate over surface — the part of the platform that outlasts the trend.

sections.text: One price model. Three commitment levels.
Bring your own LLM provider. We never see your prompts. Charge is by compute, never by seat or by page-view.

sections.caption: Three commitment levels. One price model.

sections.text: See /pricing for the full capability matrix.

sections.title: Pre-order with zero commitment.
sections.lede: We email when your tenant is provisioned. Walk away anytime with your content — it is JSON in git.
